loops.title: AI email auto-responder (Gmail + GPT-4/Claude)
loops.author: enescingoz (awesome-n8n-templates)
loops.description: Reads incoming Gmail, classifies by topic/urgency with an LLM, and drafts a context-aware reply for review.
loops.useWhen: When your inbox needs triage and first-draft replies at scale.
steps: Draft a reply from a template + context
Save as draft or send after approval
loops.implementationNote: Keep a human-approval step until reply quality is trusted.

loops.title: RAG chatbot over a company knowledge base
loops.author: n8n Team (templates)
loops.description: Retrieval-augmented chatbot that embeds your docs into a vector store (Pinecone/Qdrant/Supabase) and answers from them.
loops.useWhen: When you need a grounded assistant that answers from your own content.
steps: Embed and upsert to a vector DB
Answer with the LLM citing sources
loops.implementationNote: Re-index on document changes to avoid stale answers.

loops.title: Blog post → LinkedIn/X/newsletter repurposer
loops.author: enescingoz (awesome-n8n-templates)
loops.description: Turns one blog post into platform-tailored LinkedIn posts, tweets, and an email newsletter draft.
loops.useWhen: When you want to repurpose long-form content into many channels.
steps: Summarize + rewrite per platform with an LLM
loops.implementationNote: Add brand-voice guidelines to the prompt for consistency.

loops.title: Telegram AI assistant bot
loops.author: n8n community
loops.description: A Telegram bot backed by an LLM with memory, for Q&A and task commands.
loops.useWhen: When you want a personal assistant in Telegram.
loops.implementationNote: Scope the bot to allowed chat IDs to prevent abuse.

loops.title: Invoice/PDF data extraction to Google Sheets
loops.author: Intuz (templates roundup)
loops.description: Parses invoice PDFs, extracts line items with an LLM/OCR, and appends structured rows to Google Sheets.
loops.useWhen: When you process many invoices/receipts manually.
loops.implementationNote: Add a confidence threshold and route low-confidence docs for review.

loops.title: Daily AI news digest to email/Slack
loops.author: ai-rockstars (templates roundup)
loops.description: Aggregates RSS/news sources, summarizes with an LLM, and sends a daily digest.
loops.useWhen: When you want a curated morning briefing.
loops.implementationNote: Cap item count to keep the digest skimmable.

loops.title: Lead enrichment + CRM sync
loops.author: Goodspeed Studio (agency templates)
loops.description: Enriches new leads (company, role, socials) and upserts them into the CRM with a Slack alert.
loops.useWhen: When inbound leads need enrichment before sales follow-up.
loops.implementationNote: Respect data-privacy rules for enrichment providers.

loops.title: WhatsApp inbound automation
loops.author: n8n community
loops.description: Handles inbound WhatsApp messages, routes by intent, and replies or creates a ticket.
loops.useWhen: When you support customers over WhatsApp.
loops.implementationNote: Follow WhatsApp Business policy for automated messaging.

loops.title: Form submission → CRM contact → Slack notify
loops.author: Make Templates
loops.description: Watches a form, creates/updates a CRM contact, and posts a notification to Slack.
loops.useWhen: When new form leads must reach your CRM and team instantly.
loops.implementationNote: Use a router to branch on lead source.

loops.title: RSS → AI summary → Notion
loops.author: Make Templates
loops.description: Pulls new RSS items, summarizes with an AI module, and stores them in a Notion database.
loops.useWhen: When you build a curated reading database.
loops.implementationNote: Add a dedupe filter on item GUID.

loops.title: Email parser → Airtable
loops.author: Make Templates
loops.description: Parses structured emails (orders, alerts) and writes records into Airtable.
loops.useWhen: When inbound emails carry data you need in a table.
loops.implementationNote: Build the parser against several real samples.

loops.title: Webhook payment → tag CRM contact
loops.author: Make Templates
loops.description: Receives a payment webhook, finds the customer, and tags/segments them in the CRM.
loops.useWhen: When purchases should trigger lifecycle segmentation.
loops.implementationNote: Verify webhook signatures before processing.

loops.title: Multi-channel social scheduler
loops.author: Make Templates
loops.description: Takes a content row and publishes/schedules it across several social platforms.
loops.useWhen: When you publish the same content to many channels.
loops.implementationNote: Stagger post times to avoid duplicate-content penalties.

loops.title: Brand mention on X → Slack alert
loops.author: Databox (21 zaps)
loops.description: Notifies a Slack channel whenever your brand is mentioned on X/Twitter.
loops.useWhen: When you want real-time social listening.
loops.implementationNote: Use precise search operators to cut false positives.

loops.title: New lead → HubSpot + Slack notify
loops.author: Databox (21 zaps)
loops.description: Adds new leads to HubSpot and pings sales in Slack.
loops.useWhen: When inbound leads must reach CRM + team fast.
loops.implementationNote: Map UTM fields for attribution.

loops.title: Incoming email → task/to-do
loops.author: Zapier (examples)
loops.description: Turns starred/labeled emails into tasks in your project tool.
loops.useWhen: When email is your informal task inbox.
loops.implementationNote: Use a dedicated label to avoid task spam.

loops.title: Form submission → Google Sheets row
loops.author: Zapier (examples)
loops.description: Appends every new form response as a row in Google Sheets.
loops.useWhen: When you need a simple data log of submissions.
loops.implementationNote: Keep the sheet header in sync with form fields.

loops.title: Calendly booking → CRM + reminder
loops.author: Ringover (zap examples)
loops.description: On a new Calendly booking, creates/updates a CRM record and schedules reminders.
loops.useWhen: When meetings should sync to CRM automatically.
loops.implementationNote: Handle reschedules/cancellations with extra triggers.

loops.title: Sync unsubscribes across email systems
loops.author: Getmagical (best zaps)
loops.description: Propagates an unsubscribe in one tool to all other email systems for compliance.
loops.useWhen: When you run multiple email platforms.
loops.implementationNote: Critical for CAN-SPAM/GDPR consistency.

loops.title: Nightly restic/rsync backup
loops.author: Community (restic docs)
loops.description: Encrypted incremental backups of key paths to local + remote, with pruning and a status notification.
loops.useWhen: When you need reliable, versioned backups.
loops.implementationNote: Test restores regularly — an untested backup is a hope, not a backup.

loops.title: Let's Encrypt cert auto-renew + reload
loops.author: Community (certbot)
loops.description: Renews TLS certificates and reloads the web server only when a cert actually changes.
loops.useWhen: When you manage your own TLS certs.
loops.implementationNote: Use --deploy-hook so reloads happen only on renewal.

loops.title: Docker prune + unhealthy-container restart
loops.author: Community
loops.description: Frees disk by pruning dangling images/volumes and restarts containers failing healthchecks.
loops.useWhen: When long-running Docker hosts drift or bloat.
loops.implementationNote: Exclude volumes you must keep from pruning.

loops.title: Log rotation + compress + ship
loops.author: Community (logrotate)
loops.description: Rotates and compresses app logs and ships archives to object storage.
loops.useWhen: When app logs grow unbounded.
loops.implementationNote: Coordinate with the app's own log handling to avoid gaps.

loops.title: Daily database backup cron
loops.author: Community
loops.description: Scheduled pg_dump/mysqldump with rotation and off-box copy.
loops.useWhen: Essential alongside any data-changing workflow.
loops.implementationNote: Store at least one copy off the host.

loops.title: Hourly inbox/RSS poll
loops.author: Community
loops.description: A cron schedule that polls inboxes/feeds to drive downstream automations.
loops.useWhen: When a workflow needs periodic fetches.
loops.implementationNote: Keep a cursor to avoid reprocessing.

loops.title: Weekly dependency update + PR
loops.author: Renovate/Dependabot pattern
loops.description: Scheduled dependency upgrades that open a PR and run CI before merge.
loops.useWhen: When you want safe, steady dependency hygiene.
loops.implementationNote: Group minor/patch updates to reduce PR noise.

loops.title: GitHub Actions scheduled CI sweep
loops.author: GitHub Docs
loops.description: A scheduled workflow that runs tests/lint/security sweeps and reports results.
loops.useWhen: When you want recurring checks beyond push events.
loops.implementationNote: Scheduled runs use the default branch's workflow file.

loops.title: Airflow daily ETL DAG
loops.author: Apache Airflow Docs
loops.description: An orchestrated daily extract-transform-load pipeline with retries and alerting.
loops.useWhen: When data pipelines need dependable scheduling + retries.
loops.implementationNote: Make tasks idempotent so retries are safe.
